locked.description: If true, user cannot uncheck (used for Foundations).

docFloor.description: Marks the feature that installs the doc-map required.base floor used by generated startup baselines.

disabled.description: If true, feature is hidden from UI (used to stage future capabilities).

requires.description: Other feature IDs or capability strings that must be satisfied.

conflictsWith.description: Feature IDs that cannot be enabled at the same time.

capabilitiesNeeded.description: Preflight capabilities required for this feature to be enable-able.

remoteRequirement.description: How the feature depends on a GitHub repo: 'runtime' writes a local caller that runs once on GitHub (no auth); 'api-target' mutates a live repo via the API (needs auth + a resolved target). Absent = local-only.

creates.description: Files this feature writes into the generated repo. A validated projection of installs[]: every file/dir install path appears here (see test/capabilityManifest.test.mjs).

installs.description: Per-feature capability manifest (lane C): every filesystem effect this feature applies at onboard time. creates[], the per-task path constants, and refresh-snapshots SOURCES are all checked mirrors of this list (test/capabilityManifest.test.mjs). Shape enforced by that test against this sub-schema; the full registry is not yet machine-validated because schema.json still uses the `default` keyword the zero-dep validator rejects.

path.description: Repo-relative destination path in the onboarded repo.

source.description: Snapshot-relative origin, e.g. 'repo-template:scripts/agent/lib.mjs' or 'github-workflows:anomaly-triage.yml'. Omitted for generated/API-sourced files (README, LICENSE, CODEOWNERS) and for merge-kind entries, which carry npmScripts/appends instead.

kind.description: 'file'/'dir' = a whole path this feature owns and lists in creates[]; 'merge' = an idempotent merge into a file owned elsewhere (package.json npm scripts, .gitignore appends).

contract.description: 'required' = part of the startup-readiness floor (mirrors src/snapshots/repo-template/.agent/startup-baseline.json required[]); 'optional' = installed but not floor-mandated.

npmScripts.description: For merge-kind package.json: the managed script entries merged in (mirrors the task module's exported constant).

appends.description: For merge-kind .gitignore: the managed lines appended (mirrors the task module's exported constant).

execBit.description: True when the file must ship executable (git hook entrypoints).

commands.description: External commands (gh, git) this feature will invoke.

tasks.description: Task module IDs to run, in order.

options.description: User-selectable options (e.g. license SPDX, gitignore language).
